title: Docker Compose command not found
symptom: When attempting to run 'docker-compose', the terminal returns '-bash: docker-compose: Kommando nicht gefunden', indicating that the command is not recognized.
not_this_if: Using the built-in docker compose command without a hyphen
root_cause: The user is trying to use the standalone docker-compose command, but the system has updated Docker to use the built-in 'docker compose' command instead. The standalone binary may not be installed or recognized in the current environment.
fix_steps: Use 'docker compose up -d' instead of 'docker-compose up -d'
Optionally, create an alias for convenience by adding 'alias docker-compose="docker compose"' to your .bashrc file
agent_instruction: Use 'docker compose' instead of 'docker-compose' to run your commands.
